mapper.sql: select file_id, storage_type, bucket_name, region, object_key, original_name, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, file_url, etag, source_module, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from scm_file
mapper.update: update scm_file set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where file_id = #{fileId}
